hub_subtitle: Business English for global coffee trading

lesson.menu_desc: Review of Block 1 + write your first real email -- 27 slides
lesson.subtitle: Aula 10 -- Block 1 Review and First Real Email: Consolidation & Milestone
lesson.title_tag: Professor View -- Fernanda Gabriela Silva Rodrigues | Aula 10 -- Block 1 Review & First Real Email

listenings.text: Hi Fernanda, this is Daniel from the trading team. I have a quick request for you. A supplier in Switzerland sent a message this morning. They want an update on the coffee shipment. The shipment was confirmed last week, but they need the delivery date. Right now, the logistics team is checking the documents. Please write a short email and confirm the new date. Thank you very much.

Hi, this is Fernanda. Here is my reply to the supplier. Dear partner, thank you for your message. I am writing about the coffee shipment. The order was confirmed last week. Right now, our team is checking the delivery date. We are working on it, and I will confirm the date soon. Best regards, Fernanda. I am happy because this is my first real email in English.

extra_audio.text: First, write a clear subject line. Then, start with a greeting like Dear partner. Next, write the body with your message. Finally, end with a closing like Best regards and your name.
